queries.question: In what location and era was the episode "The Murder" set in?
queries.sql:
SELECT Location.NAME, Era.NAME
FROM Location 
JOIN STORY on Location.id = Story.location_id
JOIN EPISODE on Story.id = Episode.story_id JOIN Era on Era.id = Story.era_id
WHERE Episode.title LIKE "%The Murder%"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?location a :Location .
  ?story a :Story .
  ?story p:hasLocation ?location .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasStory ?story .
  ?era a :Era .
  ?story p:hasEra ?era .
  ?location p:name ?name .
  ?era p:name ?name2 .
  ?episode p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*The\\ Murder.*$"))
}

queries.question: In what era was the highest rated episode set in?
queries.sql:
SELECT Era.NAME
FROM Era 
JOIN STORY on Era.id = Story.era_id
JOIN EPISODE on Story.id = Episode.story_id
JOIN REVIEW on Review.episode_id = Episode.id
WHERE REVIEW.rating = (
                                            SELECT MAX(rating) 
                                             FROM REVIEW
                                            )
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?era a :Era .
  ?story a :Story .
  ?story p:hasEra ?era .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasStory ?story .
  ?review a :Review .
  ?review p:hasEpisode ?episode .
  ?era p:name ?name .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:rating ?m0 } }
  FILTER(xsd:double(?rating_x) = xsd:double(?m))
}

queries.question: In what era and location was the highest rated episode set in?
queries.sql:
SELECT Location.NAME, Era.NAME
FROM Location 
JOIN STORY on Location.id = Story.location_id
JOIN EPISODE on Story.id = Episode.story_id
JOIN Era on Era.id = Story.era_id JOIN REVIEW on Review.episode_id = Episode.id
WHERE REVIEW.rating = (
                                            SELECT MAX(rating) 
                                             FROM REVIEW
                                            )

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>

  ?era a :Era .
  ?story p:hasEra ?era .

  ?review p:hasEpisode ?episode .
  ?location p:name ?name .
  ?era p:name ?name2 .
  ?review p:rating ?rating_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:rating ?m0 } }

}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the setting of the episode "The Murder"?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?location a :Location .
  ?story a :Story .
  ?story p:hasLocation ?location .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasStory ?story .
  ?era a :Era .
  ?story p:hasEra ?era .
  ?location p:name ?name .
  ?era p:name ?name2 .
  ?episode p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*The\\ Murder.*$"))
} }
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?location a :Location .
  ?story a :Story .
  ?story p:hasLocation ?location .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasStory ?story .
  ?location p:name ?name .
  ?episode p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*The\\ Murder.*$"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?era a :Era .
  ?story a :Story .
  ?story p:hasEra ?era .
  ?episode a :Episode .
  ?episode p:hasStory ?story .
  ?era p:name ?name .
  ?episode p:title ?title_lk .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?title_lk), "^.*The\\ Murder.*$"))
} }
}
